items.title: This is the analyst who has gold bugs thinking $12,000 is not only possible, it’s the right price
items.description: Myrmikan Capital’s Daniel Oliver says we’re in the first phase of a massive bull market and the second could come fast.

items.title: CVS Health’s turnaround is paying off amid widespread changes to its health-insurance and retail-pharmacy businesses
items.description: The changes come as the wider retail-pharmacy market has been upended in recent years.

items.title: How investors are reacting as Alphabet launches landmark 100-year bond in U.K.
items.description: Alphabet’s bond issuance in the U.S. on Monday saw intense demand and was more than five times oversubscribed. The appeal of one hundred-year bonds, t...

items.title: Target cuts office and warehouse jobs, as it shifts resources toward stores
items.description: Target is cutting around 500 jobs, as it tries to put money into making its stores more appealing places to shop, according to reports.

items.title: AstraZeneca CEO teases weight-loss drug candidate as profit meets target
items.description: The pharmaceutical giant announced profit in line with expectations and revenue that slightly beat forecasts on Tuesday.
